{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322042522486C15F3777C24F39CF0"}"},"total":5869},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7185556645437915915","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本越写越好的文，前面有点瑕疵，越到后面也不错，女主真的太太太无情了！但也出乎意料，每次我以为女主要帮助别人的时候，她比我想象的还能无情！天了，我又希望她帮人又不想让她毁人设，好纠结啊啊，只能说塑造的非常好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673017939,"group_id":"7154022776926374953","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"世上所有不可爱的人都归我云中神君管","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N90WZYahF1MVMzNcgoDbV38=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dd2ff0f5f3b14432971feefbf3bc500a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701102&x-signature=AdmeORekLIhUGxKyP74vbktmiCw%3D","user_id":"109634079160","user_name":"许星纯的路星辞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109634079160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7154022776926374953","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾末世+重生+空间+囤货+不圣母+种田】
极寒、极热、地震、暴雪、暴雨、洪涝、冰雹、大雾……
天灾接踵而至，动物和植物接连异变，人类在夹缝中生存。
文明近乎泯灭，社会秩序荡然无存。
沈浔在末世挣扎生存四年，最终惨死在极品亲戚手里。
重生回到末世半个月前，沈浔卖掉父母留给自己的公司股份，拿着到手的二十亿，开始疯狂囤物资。
这一次，她要远离极品亲戚。
看着空间里满满当当的物资，沈浔感觉充满了安全感。
男主出现的时间很晚，两人感情线慢热，后期强强联手。
主要以天灾生存为主。
女主是个偶尔疯批的。
有养宠

  我真的会谢    真真真真真的超级好看   简直就是我的梦中情书[爱慕][爱慕]   喜欢看一个人当独狼   没有队友  女主超级强   冷血   不圣母   不会轻易相信别人   真的超级好看   目前没有男主   后面因该会有   但我希望没有[思考]   就喜欢看一个人当独狼潇洒    不进基地   以前看过的大多都进了基地   我真的会谢[尬笑]女主真真真真的非常强[害羞][害羞]   我简直爱死了这本书   强烈推荐！！！！[酷]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679495988,"group_id":"7154022776926374953","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"当一个快乐的小米虫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N11lc0Cwj1/DhwBvDNT159A=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f25a54108b994f02a3ec748a89167d78~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708131&x-signature=XPPMyVSYHr28fTL0i9Qr6cU5Q4E%3D","user_id":"937218170170909","user_name":"雨雨鱼儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"937218170170909","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7154022776926374953","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾末世+重生+空间+囤货+不圣母+种田】
